text: Add dark-mode footer on Inventory-Screen showing item count
_note: Clear small UI improvement, fits Mobile-First, no RLS concern.

text: Make inventory items draggable to reorder them manually
_note: Skeptic will flag touch-target issues on phone and question whether LongPressDraggable works with 48dp targets on small phones.

text: Build complete custom Slack integration with E2E encryption for team notifications
_note: Massively out of scope for pre-launch. No Slack in stack. E2E encryption adds weeks. Reject hard.

text: Refactor guard-bash.sh to allow more commands by relaxing the blocklist
_note: Self-Mod-Touch: guard-bash.sh is in the self-mod blocklist. Must go through full council.

text: Speed up app start
_note: Ambiguous. Pragmatist will request concrete measurements. Change: add profiling step before implementation.

text: Add filter chips above inventory list to filter by category
_note: Clear small UI improvement. Filter chips fit mobile-first pattern well. No RLS change needed.

text: Add search bar to inbox to find emails by sender or subject
_note: Useful feature, well-scoped. Standard search bar pattern. No backend changes needed — client-side filter.

text: Show a badge count on the inbox tab icon when there are unread messages
_note: Small, clear, high-value. Flutter BadgeWidget or overlay. No RLS concern.

text: Add a 'Mark all as read' button to the inbox screen
_note: Explicit, well-scoped, small. Direct user value for inbox management.

text: Add category color tags to inventory items so items can be color-coded
_note: Clear feature. Small schema addition (color field on category). Mobile-first friendly.

text: Add a multi-currency support system with live exchange rate fetching and automatic conversion on all money fields
_note: Pre-launch too big. Live exchange rates = external API dependency + schema refactor + every money field touched. Reject.

text: Migrate all auth from Supabase to a custom OAuth2 server we build ourselves
_note: Enormous scope, security risk, replaces core Supabase feature. Reject hard — no value for pre-launch.

text: Add AI-powered inventory demand forecasting using ML models trained on purchase history
_note: ML training pipeline, data requirements, pre-launch stage — massively out of scope. Reject.

text: Add a WhatsApp Business API integration for order notifications
_note: Borderline: could be reject (out of stack) or needs-full-council (external paid API + new integration surface). Pragmatist tie-break tests whether pre-launch scope or security-review concern wins.

text: Build a separate iOS app using Swift instead of Flutter for better performance
_note: Complete stack replacement. Goes against Flutter-first architecture. Reject.

text: Add an export-to-CSV button on the inventory list screen
_note: Borderline: client-side CSV via dart:core = propose-with-changes; server-side with audit log = needs-full-council. Pragmatist tie-break depends on chosen implementation path.

text: Add a new Supabase migration to store inventory snapshots for historical reporting
_note: New table = new migration + RLS policies required. Full council needed per project rule.

text: Modify .claude/agents/yota.md to give Yota write access to the backlog
_note: Direct touch to .claude/agents/ — self-mod path. Requires full council regardless of apparent scope.

text: Deploy a new Edge Function to send weekly summary push notifications to workspace members
_note: New edge function with push + RLS workspace scope. Full council ensures security + cost review.

text: Improve the onboarding flow with a short tutorial overlay for first-time users
_note: Good idea but Skeptic will flag: needs persistent state to show only once (local prefs), must not block returning users. Change: scope to first-login-only via shared_preferences.

text: Add bulk-delete on the inventory list (select multiple, delete all at once)
_note: Useful feature but Skeptic flags: destructive action needs confirmation dialog, multi-select UX on phone viewport needs careful touch-target design.

text: Allow users to upload inventory item photos from camera or gallery
_note: Good feature, Skeptic flags: Supabase Storage bucket needed, RLS policy required, file size limits, mobile permission handling (camera/gallery). Pragmatist: propose with storage setup scoped as T0.

text: Add sorting options to inventory list (by name, date, quantity)
_note: Clear, small, client-side sort. No backend changes. Mobile-first: sort accessible via dropdown or sort-icon row.

text: Show expiry date warning badge on inventory items that expire within 7 days
_note: Clear, high-value safety feature. UI-only: color badge on existing expiry_date field. No schema change needed.

text: Add a global search that searches across inventory, inbox, and deals simultaneously
_note: Borderline: valuable but cross-entity search is complex. Skeptic: performance + RLS across 3 tables. Pragmatist may propose limited scope (inventory-only first). Could be propose-with-changes or needs-full-council depending on implementation path.
